Formerly: BIOL709F.

BIOL708 Advanced Topics in Biology (1-4 Credits)

Lectures, experimental courses and other special instructions in various zoological subjects.

Repeatable to: 8 credits if content differs.

Credit Only Granted for. BIOL708 or ZOOL708.

Formerly: ZOOL708.

BIOL709 Selected Advanced Topics in Biology (1-4 Credits)
